name: Avgolemono Soup (Lemon)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, stir the milk and cornstarch together. Add the egg yolks and beat until well combined.
2. Set aside.
3. Bring the chicken stock to a boil in a 4-quart soup pot. Once boiling, add the rice and cook, covered, until the rice is puffy and tender (about 25 minutes).
4. Remove the pot from heat. Slowly stir in the milk and egg yolk mixture.
5. Continue cooking for a moment until thickened.
6. Turn off the heat. Add the butter, chopped parsley, and lemon juice to the soup.
7. Optionally, add grated lemon peel if desired.
